docs.title: Adult Self-Transcendence Inventory (ASTI) Assessment Schema
docs.text:
LinkML schema for capturing data from an instance of the Adult Self-Transcendence Inventory (ASTI). The ASTI assesses self-transcendence by comparing current feelings to those of five years ago.

URI: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti

Name: asti-assessment-schema

docs.title: Classes
docs.text: Class Description ASTIAssessment An assessment instance using the Adult Self-Transcendence Inventory. ASTIResponses The set of responses to the 18 questions in the ASTI instrument for a single assessment. Person A person involved in the assessment, either as the subject being assessed or the evaluator.

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Slot Description age Age of the person in years at the time of assessment or when recorded assessment_date Date when the assessment was conducted assessment_id Unique identifier for this specific ASTI assessment instance evaluator Person who administered or evaluated the assessment (if applicable) gender Gender of the person item_1 Response to: I am more likely to engage in quiet contemplation item_10 Response to: My sense of self has decreased as I have gotten older item_11 Response to: My sense of self is less dependent on other people and things item_12 Response to: I do not become angry as easily item_13 Response to: I take myself less seriously item_14 Response to: I have less patience with other people item_15 Response to: I find more joy in life item_16 Response to: Material things mean less to me item_17 Response to: I am less optimistic about the future of humanity item_18 Response to: I feel much more compassionate, even toward my enemies item_2 Response to: I feel that my individual life is a part of a greater whole item_3 Response to: I have become less concerned about other people's opinions of me item_4 Response to: I feel that my life has less meaning item_5 Response to: I am more focused on the present item_6 Response to: I feel a greater sense of belonging with both earlier and future... item_7 Response to: My peace of mind is not so easily upset as it used to be item_8 Response to: I feel more isolated and lonely item_9 Response to: I am less interested in seeking out social contacts name Full name of the person person_id Unique identifier for a person (subject or evaluator) responses The complete set of responses provided by the subject for this ASTI assessmen... subject The person who is the subject of the assessment total_score Total calculated score for the ASTI assessment after accounting for reverse-s...

docs.title: Enumerations
docs.text: Enumeration Description ASTILikertScale A 4-point Likert scale from 'Disagree Strongly' (1) to 'Agree Strongly' (4) u...

docs.title: Types
docs.text: Type Description Boolean A binary (true or false) value Curie a compact URI Date a date (year, month and day) in an idealized calendar DateOrDatetime Either a date or a datetime Datetime The combination of a date and time Decimal A real number with arbitrary precision that conforms to the xsd:decimal speci... Double A real number that conforms to the xsd:double specification Float A real number that conforms to the xsd:float specification Integer An integer Jsonpath A string encoding a JSON Path Jsonpointer A string encoding a JSON Pointer Ncname Prefix part of CURIE Nodeidentifier A URI, CURIE or BNODE that represents a node in a model Objectidentifier A URI or CURIE that represents an object in the model Sparqlpath A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path String A character string Time A time object represents a (local) time of day, independent of any particular... Uri a complete URI Uriorcurie a URI or a CURIE

docs.text: Subset Description

docs.title: Class: ASTIAssessment
docs.text:
An assessment instance using the Adult Self-Transcendence Inventory.

URI: schema:MedicalTest

 classDiagram
    class ASTIAssessment
    click ASTIAssessment href "../ASTIAssessment"
      ASTIAssessment : assessment_date

      ASTIAssessment : assessment_id

      ASTIAssessment : evaluator




    ASTIAssessment --> "0..1" Person : evaluator
    click Person href "../Person"


      ASTIAssessment : responses




    ASTIAssessment --> "1" ASTIResponses : responses
    click ASTIResponses href "../ASTIResponses"


      ASTIAssessment : subject




    ASTIAssessment --> "1" Person : subject
    click Person href "../Person"


      ASTIAssessment : total_score

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance assessment_id 1  String Unique identifier for this specific ASTI assessment instance direct subject 1  Person The person who is the subject of the assessment direct assessment_date 1  Date Date when the assessment was conducted direct responses 1  ASTIResponses The complete set of responses provided by the subject for this ASTI assessmen... direct total_score 0..1  Integer Total calculated score for the ASTI assessment after accounting for reverse-s... direct evaluator 0..1  Person Person who administered or evaluated the assessment (if applicable) direct

docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti

docs.title: Mappings
docs.text: Mapping Type Mapped Value self schema:MedicalTest native asti:ASTIAssessment

docs.title: Direct
docs.text:
name: ASTIAssessment
description: An assessment instance using the Adult Self-Transcendence Inventory.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
slots:
- assessment_id
- subject
- assessment_date
- responses
- total_score
- evaluator
class_uri: schema:MedicalTest

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: ASTIAssessment
description: An assessment instance using the Adult Self-Transcendence Inventory.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
attributes:
  assessment_id:
    name: assessment_id
    description: Unique identifier for this specific ASTI assessment instance.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:identifier
    identifier: true
    alias: assessment_id
    owner: ASTIAssessment
    domain_of:
    - ASTIAssessment
    range: string
    required: true
  subject:
    name: subject
    description: The person who is the subject of the assessment.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:subjectOf
    alias: subject
    owner: ASTIAssessment
    domain_of:
    - ASTIAssessment
    range: Person
    required: true
  assessment_date:
    name: assessment_date
    description: Date when the assessment was conducted.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:dateCreated
    alias: assessment_date
    owner: ASTIAssessment
    domain_of:
    - ASTIAssessment
    range: date
    required: true
  responses:
    name: responses
    description: The complete set of responses provided by the subject for this ASTI
      assessment.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
    rank: 1000
    alias: responses
    owner: ASTIAssessment
    domain_of:
    - ASTIAssessment
    range: ASTIResponses
    required: true
  total_score:
    name: total_score
    description: Total calculated score for the ASTI assessment after accounting for
      reverse-scored items.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:result
    alias: total_score
    owner: ASTIAssessment
    domain_of:
    - ASTIAssessment
    range: integer
  evaluator:
    name: evaluator
    description: Person who administered or evaluated the assessment (if applicable).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: schema:performer
    alias: evaluator
    owner: ASTIAssessment
    domain_of:
    - ASTIAssessment
    range: Person
class_uri: schema:MedicalTest

docs.title: Enum: ASTILikertScale
docs.text:
A 4-point Likert scale from 'Disagree Strongly' (1) to 'Agree Strongly' (4) used in the ASTI. Values are numeric strings.

URI: ASTILikertScale

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description Disagree strongly NCIT:C103506 Corresponds to a score of 1 Disagree somewhat NCIT:C91291 Corresponds to a score of 2 Agree somewhat NCIT:C91292 Corresponds to a score of 3 Agree strongly NCIT:C91293 Corresponds to a score of 4

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Description item_1 Response to: I am more likely to engage in quiet contemplation item_2 Response to: I feel that my individual life is a part of a greater whole item_3 Response to: I have become less concerned about other people's opinions of me item_4 Response to: I feel that my life has less meaning item_5 Response to: I am more focused on the present item_6 Response to: I feel a greater sense of belonging with both earlier and future... item_7 Response to: My peace of mind is not so easily upset as it used to be item_8 Response to: I feel more isolated and lonely item_9 Response to: I am less interested in seeking out social contacts item_10 Response to: My sense of self has decreased as I have gotten older item_11 Response to: My sense of self is less dependent on other people and things item_12 Response to: I do not become angry as easily item_13 Response to: I take myself less seriously item_14 Response to: I have less patience with other people item_15 Response to: I find more joy in life item_16 Response to: Material things mean less to me item_17 Response to: I am less optimistic about the future of humanity item_18 Response to: I feel much more compassionate, even toward my enemies

docs.title: Schema Source
docs.text: • from schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti

docs.title: LinkML Source
docs.text:
name: ASTILikertScale
description: A 4-point Likert scale from 'Disagree Strongly' (1) to 'Agree Strongly'
  (4) used in the ASTI. Values are numeric strings.
from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  Disagree strongly:
    text: Disagree strongly
    description: Corresponds to a score of 1.
    meaning: NCIT:C103506
    rank: 1
  Disagree somewhat:
    text: Disagree somewhat
    description: Corresponds to a score of 2.
    meaning: NCIT:C91291
    rank: 2
  Agree somewhat:
    text: Agree somewhat
    description: Corresponds to a score of 3.
    meaning: NCIT:C91292
    rank: 3
  Agree strongly:
    text: Agree strongly
    description: Corresponds to a score of 4.
    meaning: NCIT:C91293
    rank: 4

attributes:
  item_1:
    name: item_1

      opinions of me.'

  item_4:

    description: 'Response to: I feel that my life has less meaning.'

    - This item is reverse-scored.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
    rank: 1000

docs.title: asti-assessment-schema
docs.text:
LinkML schema for capturing data from an instance of the Adult Self-Transcendence Inventory (ASTI). The ASTI assesses self-transcendence by comparing current feelings to those of five years ago.

URI: https://w3id.org/phases/assessment/gerotranscendance/asti
